creator: will.brokenbourgh2877@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #2)
Thanks.  I don't really use this port, just was trying it out.  I'm not versed enough in FreeBSD's ports system to produce a diff, and NetSurf's source is very odd (to me) compared to other projects.

Because of these challenges, I will close this.

Thanks! :-)
